mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window, or positive return frequency drops below 50% during rate cut periods.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 6.5 percent, labor market deterioration signals severe economic contraction, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in more than 55 percent of observations where UNRATE exceeds 6.5 percent.

mechanism_narrative: Rising real short-term assets combined with falling federal funds rates indicate liquidity injection into financial markets, producing positive equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict positive returns when RSAFS growth exceeds 5 percent annually while FEDFUNDS declines.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production growth signals improving corporate output capacity, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next week during expansion phases.
failure_condition: Positive return frequency falls below 45 percent when INDPRO month-over-month growth exceeds 0.5 percent.

mechanism_narrative: Higher quarterly real GDP growth reflects stronger aggregate demand and corporate earnings potential, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Walk-forward correlation between GDPC1 growth and 60-day forward returns remains below 0.05 over any 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: When the consumer price index exceeds 215.0, accelerating inflation forces tighter monetary policy expectations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in more than 60 percent of observations where CPIAUCSL crosses above 215.0.

mechanism_narrative: Declining total nonfarm payrolls alongside falling housing starts indicate synchronized economic weakness, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The combined decline in PAYEMS and HOUST fails to predict negative returns when both series drop by more than 2 percent sequentially.

mechanism_narrative: Falling housing starts below 600 thousand units signal collapsing residential investment, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next week during credit crunches.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in more than 50 percent of instances where HOUST falls below 600 thousand units.
